name: Summons Sword: Pot Guardian
short_description: "Summons Sword: Pot Guardian" is a top-down, highly challenging action game. Teleport to dodge enemy attacks, fight with swords and summoning magic, and recover the treasure "Clay Pot of Darkness" stolen by the evil summoner!
detailed_description:
■ Story

Here on a floating island high in the sky, Mana the summoner begins her adventure as she sets out to reclaim the "Clay Pot of Darkness" from an evil summoner!

 

 

■ Game Features

It is a top-down action game with high difficulty.

This is a stage-based 3D game.

 

1.Teleport anytime.

Even during an attack or when unable to act, you can consume MP to teleport nearby.

 

2.Can summon almost any enemy as an ally.

When you defeat an enemy, they will drop an item (summon ball) that allows you to summon that enemy as an ally.

Some enemies do not drop items.

 

3.You can get weapons used by enemies.

When you defeat an enemy, the weapon they are using will drop.

Some enemies do not drop certain items.

 

 

■ Game Controls

Supports keyboard, mouse, and gamepad.

Gamepad recommended.
